name: mantisbt
description: Read and manage MantisBT bug tracker issues from Claude Code — search, create, update, and annotate issues via the MantisBT REST API.

base_url.title: MantisBT API URL
base_url.description: Base URL of your MantisBT REST API, e.g. https://bugs.example.com/api/rest

api_key.title: API Key
api_key.description: MantisBT API key — generate one in MantisBT under Profile → API Tokens
